mprRenameInFamily.Description: Batch renaming of parameter names, type names, parameter values in the specified families
mprRenameInFamily.FullDescription: Processing selected files or all files in selected folders. Prefix or suffix addition and search-and-replace renaming are available. Several search-and-replace options are provided, including regular expression support
mprRenameInFamily.msg1: Value has been changed from "{0} " to " {1}"
mprRenameInFamily.msg3: Among the selected family files, there are files with the "Read-Only" property. These files cannot be saved. Disable the "Read-Only" property for these files?
mprRenameInFamily.msg4: You have not selected any family file!
mprRenameInFamily.msg8: It is not possible to change the value of the parameter that should point to the element
mprRenameInFamily.msg10: It is not possible to change the value of the parameter given by the formula
mprRenameInFamily.msg12: Unable to change the type of built-in parameter
